rationale: The cited paper provides a theory of conspicuous-goods demand and social effects (snob/conformist motives), and the citing paper studies TV ad effectiveness heterogeneity by price/quality positioning in autos, so a conceptual mechanism link is plausible. However, the available evidence is only a single DOI match (reference index 3) with no local citation context or explicit mention in the citing note. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
